seeded_negative_coverage.active_path: binding, authority, lifecycle, artifact hash, runtime identity, content, license, benchmark hash/scope/primary/hard-bucket/freshness, rollback provider/authority/artifact/evidence/freshness
seeded_negative_coverage.current_inputs: pipeline, external registry, model registry, rollback evidence, and governance-decision dependency missing or drifted
seeded_negative_coverage.review: missing file, signature/payload tamper, expiry/staleness, event/input/role recomputation, and forged-pass rejection

authority_boundary: This evidence proves CI integrity, freshness, current-input, decision-log, signature, and exhaustive seeded semantic enforcement. It does not claim that the current currency review passes or that missing benchmark and rollback evidence exists.
